steps: Input a message expressing stress or anxiety
Submit the message to the system
tests.expected_result: The response acknowledges the user's emotion and provides at least one relevant coping suggestion.
tests.notes: Updated to verify emotional acknowledgment and actionable support.

steps: Use core features continuously for 5 minutes
tests.expected_result: The application does not crash or freeze during the test duration.
tests.notes: Rewritten to include measurable time-based condition.

steps: Start a conversation with the system
Check if previous messages remain visible
tests.expected_result: All messages remain visible and are not lost during the session.
tests.notes: Aligned with requirement on preventing data loss.

steps: Simulate a temporary error (e.g., disconnect network briefly)
tests.expected_result: Previous conversation data remains accessible after recovery.

steps: Provide a sequence of related messages
tests.expected_result: Responses reflect and align with previous user inputs in the conversation.
tests.notes: Tests contextual relevance across multiple turns.

steps: Send different inputs to the system
tests.expected_result: The system does not repeat identical responses more than once.
tests.notes: Converted vague repetition issue into measurable constraint.

steps: Start a conversation and send messages
tests.expected_result: Previous conversations are accessible after reopening the app.
tests.notes: Aligned with requirement for persistent conversation history.

steps: Send a message in the selected language
tests.expected_result: The system responds in the selected language.
tests.notes: Ensures language selection affects system output.

steps: Launch the app for the first time
tests.expected_result: User is able to skip optional onboarding questions.
Core features are accessible within 3 steps or fewer.
tests.notes: Replaced vague usability with measurable navigation constraint.
